Hello everybody! Dr. Cashy is here and I want to introduce you to the Compendium of Knowledge Volume 1 to paraphrase Arnold. I know you have a bunch of questions and I know you want some answered immediately. So that is what we are going to do. I'm going to accumulate as much stuff as I can possibly to go through as many of the most common questions you guys have encountered. So let us hop to it. Alright so the first thing I want to cover is drug interactions and medical conditions. Okay I did my damnedest to account for all of the drug interactions that I could possibly manage. However there is a number of drug nutrient herbosolomal medical conditions combinations that approaches infinity. Ergo it is literally impossible for me to test all of them or for anybody to test all of them before we die. Okay I just want to lay that out there for everybody. However I am confident in saying that the ingredients are generally regarded as safe in a healthy population. Fair to say. Comfortable with that. So if you get questions from clients that express concerns with interactions between dietary supplements and medical conditions or prescription drugs then refer the client to their respective oligest that oversees their condition. Okay. All of us the most common oligest as examples. Alright if a client has an endocrine condition for example a thyroid then refer them to their endocrinologist. If a client has a digestive condition for example IBD then refer them to their gastroenterologist. If a client has a kidney condition for example CKD then refer them to their nephrologist. If a client has a pregnant condition for example she is pregnant then refer her to her obstetrician gynecologist. Very well moving on. The next most realistic or logical thing to talk about I think is the side effects of supplements that people may have been experiencing. Okay. The most common things you end up seeing are peristhesia which is tangles, flushing, okay heat and skin redness. Okay which sometimes in some people appears as red dots. Okay especially like around the neck. So these are the two most common things that you'll get questions about and it can be surprising if you don't really know what's coming or you don't know what it is. Okay if you get temporarily sensitive skin from increased blood flow and some nerve excitation okay. This does typically go away and people do build a tolerance to it. So this is something to keep in mind okay. Both proof vitalities test storm and pre-step one are the products most likely to generate this sort of feeling. Okay very well. Okay also something to keep in mind. Stomach stuff very very common okay and this is something that I want to lay out is that all dietary supplements, all foods, all everybody all the time has some chance to harbor stomach discomfort. Okay everything all the time everyone. Alright it's idiopathic so to speak. Taking supplements with food and starting out on a lower dose will decrease the active components and slowly absorption which will mitigate the onset of things like peristhesia, flushing and any stomach discomfort that may come from really taking your stuff which is okay. Okay when it comes to reports other than these things okay like angry like angry tummies and increased blood flow. Okay keep in mind the following alright. I want to introduce nocebo discuss that a little bit in another video that you guys have probably seen. Nocebo is the physical manifestation of a negative psychology surrounding an intervention okay and it's just as common if not more common than pluscebo which pretty much everybody has heard of which is the physical manifestation of a positive psychology surrounding an intervention. Alright for that reason if a client has a negative experience with a supplement avoid confrontation avoid arguing and for Pete's sake please avoid science okay be understanding and offer an alternative that continues to propel them towards their goals. If a person feels bad they should stop. That's really that's really it nobody should feel bad okay no matter what you think about it or I think about it okay. So if somebody feels good and they take a supplement great keep on keeping on. If somebody feels crappy when they take a supplement great suggest an alternative keep on trucking. Okay so next section what what prestige live supplements are best for teenagers okay practically and ethically I feel it is best for a teenager athlete to focus exclusively on performance and this leaves a convenient forebanger for that teenager okay it leaves you with intra-pre-step one I don't really suggest pre-step two for teenagers sleep multiplier and bulletproof vitality. Wham bam thank you man okay and then are all of the prestige live supplements okay for tested athletes. I do want to say prestige live supplements are okay for what a test that athletes but they're not guaranteed for smaller domestic or independent testing organizations that being said always make sure to double check ingredient profiles with band substances rules are constantly in flux and I choose to use water as the standard. Bokey-dokey are prestige live supplements okay for pregnant females pregnant people persons per pregnancy and breastfeeding okay referring to the earlier part of the video if a client is pregnant or breastfeeding make sure to refer to her to her OBGYN. However if the people from this is cashier pregnant and or breastfeeding she would probably take intra-EFA bulletproof vitality in sleep multiplier. I don't feel it I don't feel it. Alright everybody this is a tricky one to address I'm gonna tell you how I feel about it and then it's up to you to flavor it in the language that's most appropriate for your culture okay. Prestige lab supplements are not drugs they are dietary supplements. For many products even prescription drugs feeling it is the result of taking too damn much and therefore ironically enough the experience of feeling it is actually a side effect okay after all you cannot feel fat being mobilized and metabolized you cannot feel muscles being built. However if a client feels they need stimulation there's a stimulant product which has a variable dosing schema to facilitate that stimulation in case there's any confusion it's the product that has a freaking ass jet pack on it. Last and most important nocebo is powerful enough to override the beneficial effect of a legitimate intervention that means if somebody is taking a drug or a supplement or doing a program that is scientifically proven to work if a person does not feel it is going to work then there is a pile of data that shows that it's either not going to work at all or not work as well or possibly even get worse that is the power of nocebo. For that reason keep morale high build a solid foundation of trust with your clients it is no coincidence our clients with the most supportive environments get the best results out of their training the nutrition and their supplementation please please please keep that in mind it is by far the most important thing out of all of this okay. This is about enhancing the benefits of a sound nutrition and exercise program no matter how powerful the product may be nothing is ever going to replace poor habits until next time Dr. Cassie out.
